tooltip.crawl: Starts a new scan run. If no sitemap is loaded, asks for the URL.
tooltip.load_sitemap: Opens a file dialog to load a local sitemap.xml.
tooltip.history: Opens the list of past scans (re-use a URL).
tooltip.report: Saves HTML and JSON reports of the current scan.
tooltip.top_errors: Shows the ten most frequent errors as a bar chart.
tooltip.summary: Reopens the scan summary: site score, findings, largest pages and memory hogs. Only available after a completed scan.
tooltip.errors_only: Filters the table to pages with errors.
tooltip.copy_details: Copies the right detail pane to the clipboard.
tooltip.http_codes: Opens a reference table of all common HTTP status codes (2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx) with meaning and explanation.
tooltip.info: Shows the about dialog with version and license.
tooltip.settings: Opens settings (language, consent, scroll, concurrency, whitelist, …).
tooltip.theme: Cycles to the next retro theme. Full picker via Ctrl+P → "theme".
notify.no_urls_loaded: No URLs loaded! Please load a sitemap first.
notify.no_whitelist: No whitelist loaded. Set the path in settings (s).
notify.no_results_for_top: No results yet for the Top 10 view.
sitemap_error.title: Error
about.description:
Scans websites for JavaScript console
errors and HTTP errors (404, 5xx).
error_detail_screen.title: Error details: {url}
history.title: Scan history
history.empty:
No scans in history yet.

Start a scan with a sitemap URL,
and it will appear here.
top_errors.title: Top 10 errors
whitelist.title: Whitelist
whitelist.empty:
No whitelist loaded.

In settings (key s), enter the path to a
whitelist.json file. Loaded patterns will appear here.
header.title: Console Error Scanner
detail.no_url:
No URL selected.

Pick a URL from the list on the left to view its details.
detail.http_collapsed_hint: {count} headers collapsed — click the title to expand.
table.tooltip_size: Actual transfer size of all resources from the same host loaded during the scan (uncached). Per resource the largest response counts (no double counting); streamed video/audio is excluded. This is not the HTML document size but the host's total weight.
table.tooltip_time: Browser load time up to the Load event (Navigation Timing API, same semantics as DevTools 'Load'). Note: during a parallel scan multiple tabs share CPU and bandwidth - the absolute values are therefore higher than a single DevTools measurement and are only meant for relative comparison within the same scan.
table.tooltip_requests: Number of ALL requests the page triggered during the scan (document, scripts, images, fonts, XHR, ...) - matches the request count in the Edge network monitor.
sitemap.fetch_failed: Could not load sitemap after {retries} attempts: {error}
report.title: Console Error Scanner Report
settings.consent_tip: Clicks cookie banners (Usercentrics, OneTrust, Cookiebot, …) away automatically so tracking scripts load and their errors become visible. Off = banners are only visually hidden.
settings.scroll_tip: Scrolls every page to the bottom once and waits until lazy-loaded images and content become visible. Without this step, 404 images below the first viewport stay undetected.
settings.concurrency_tip: Number of parallel browser tabs. More = faster, but higher CPU/RAM load and higher risk of rate limits.
settings.timeout_tip: Maximum wait time per page (in seconds) before the scan of that URL is cancelled as timeout.
settings.size_warn_tip: From this page size (in MB) the URL is highlighted red in the list and marked with a warning symbol. 0 = off.
settings.score_weight_tip: Weight of the error rate in the site score (0-100 %). The remainder applies to page size. E.g. 60 = 60 % errors, 40 % size.
diet.title: Diet advisor: {url}
diet.subtitle: Largest resources ({size} total)
diet.none: No resource data available - please re-scan the page.
diet.tip: Tip: serving images as WebP/AVIF and properly scaled usually saves the most.
summary.title: Scan complete
settings.console_level_tip: Which console.* messages are captured: error = errors only; warn = errors + warnings (default); all = additionally info/log/debug. Info/log/debug are NOT captured as long as the level is „warn“.
settings.preview_checkbox: Show a screenshot of the selected page
settings.preview_tip: Renders a screenshot of the selected URL in the detail pane. Screenshots are taken in the background via a Playwright sidecar and cached to disk (HTTP validator + TTL). Right-click the image to copy it to the clipboard.
settings.headless_tip: By default Chromium runs invisibly in the background. Enable to see the browser during the scan — only useful for debugging.
settings.user_agent_tip: Custom User-Agent for browser requests. Empty = realistic Chrome 131 on Windows (bypasses most bot-detection heuristics).
settings.whitelist_tip: JSON file with wildcard patterns (fnmatch syntax) that are ignored as known errors. Empty = no whitelist. Applied immediately.
settings.cookies_tip: Cookies set in the browser before every scan. Format: name=value; separate multiple with ; or ,.
settings.app_hint: Settings apply from the next scan; current scan data is preserved.
preview.select: Pick a URL from the list to see a preview here.
preview.loading_hint: May take 2-3 seconds - accepting cookie consent and loading images (lazy-loading).
preview.tooltip: Right-click: copy to clipboard  ·  Shift + right-click: save as PNG
ctx.rescan_busy: Please wait — a running scan blocks single-URL rescan.
url_input.title: Enter URL
url_input.prompt: Website URL, sitemap URL or local sitemap.xml:
file_picker.title: Select sitemap file
cli.banner_2: Scans websites for console errors and HTTP errors (404, 5xx)
